chapter_title.en: The Severity of a Believer’s Afflictions

text: 8 - وعن أبي الحسن (ع) قال: ما أحدٌ من شيعتِنا يبتَليه الله (جلّ جلاله) بِبَلِيّةٍ فيصبر عليها إلاّ كان له أجرُ ألفِ شهيد

en.muhajir-b-ali: 8. It has been narrated that Abu al-Hasan (a.s) said: “Anyone of our Shi'ah who is afflicted by Allah with a trial and bears it with patience shall have the reward of one thousand martyrs.”
